name: io.github.hairglasses-studio/dotfiles-mcp
title: dotfiles-mcp
description: Hyprland, Wayland desktop, GitHub org, and fleet automation for Linux workstations.

environmentVariables.name: DOTFILES_MCP_PROFILE
environmentVariables.description: Startup profile: default, desktop, ops, or full.

environmentVariables.name: WAYLAND_DISPLAY
environmentVariables.description: Wayland socket name when mounting a host desktop session.

environmentVariables.name: HYPRLAND_INSTANCE_SIGNATURE
environmentVariables.description: Hyprland instance signature for host IPC discovery.
